combat_crypt_werewolves.title: Breach Ambuscade
combat_crypt_werewolves.description: A howl echoes through the masonry! Werewolves surround you.

combat_cultists_01.title: Cistern Disruption
combat_cultists_01.description: The cultists break their chant and draw jagged daggers!

combat_flesh_construct.title: The Awakening
combat_flesh_construct.description: The massive construct hauls itself out of the freezing water.
